title: Fix rand_mode()/constraint_mode() crash when used as function arguments

features.name: rand_mode method call as function argument
features.description: Code should include a call to rand_mode() method on a class instance passed as an argument to another function call
features.snippet:
class C; rand int x; endclass
C c; initial check_mode("x", c.rand_mode(), 1);

features.name: constraint_mode method call as function argument
features.description: Code should include a call to constraint_mode() method on a class instance passed as an argument to another function call
features.snippet:
class C; int x; constraint c { x > 0; } endclass
C c; initial check_mode("c", c.constraint_mode(), 1);

features.name: class with rand_mode and constraint_mode method calls in same expression
features.description: Code should include a class with randomization methods where rand_mode() and constraint_mode() return values are used together in a function call expression
